case_title: KEN FISHER VS. JUNP START COMMUNICATIONS INC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISHER, KEN AS TO DEFENDANT JUNP START COMMUNICATIONS INC A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
